message:
fix: restore v3 dependency files and sync lock file

Restore pre-merge versions of files that v3 code depends on:
- VectorBackend.ts: VectorBackendAsync export for rvf backends
- factory.ts: RvfDetection type for wasm-loader
- db-fallback.ts: wrapExistingSqlJsDatabase for migrate command
- wasm-loader.ts: coordination + rvf exports
- route.ts: routingTimeMs type fix

Regenerate package-lock.json to match package.json versions.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,6 @@
 echo "🔍 Validating commit message..."
 
 # Validate commit message format
-node scripts/validate-commit-msg.cjs "$1"
+node scripts/validate-commit-msg.js "$1"
 
 echo "✅ Commit message is valid!"
